extract: Heahea Beach (Japanese: カンタイビーチ Kantai Beach) is a location on Akala Island in Alola, located west of Heahea City. It serves as the Akala Surf Spot for Mantine Surf. It only appears in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. The beach has connections to Heahea City at both its east and its south. The eastern staircase is blocked by Pyukumuku until the player encounters Sina and Dexio.
